results.title: Ebola Fear Clouds FIFA World Cup 2026: Authorities on Edge As Outbreak in Africa Spreads
results.description: With the FIFA World Cup 2026 just around the corner, a major Ebola outbreak in Africa is causing serious concern. Authorities fear that footballers from affected African nations could spread the infection, so they're taking strict precautions.
